title: AgentDefinition
description: Defines an agent in the CNS/Cortxt system — model, auth, tools, and eval criteria.

provider.description: Model provider. 'claude-code' uses the local Claude Code login (no API credits needed).

fallback_model.description: Fallback model ID when primary is unavailable. Chain follows agent_host.py: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY → .cns-agent-key → Claude Code login.

prompt.description: System prompt. Keep concise — full prompts live in .claude/agents/<name>.md.

tools.description: MCP tool names (cortxt_*) this agent is allowed to call.

eval_criteria.description: Criteria for evaluating agent output quality.

read_only.description: If true, agent may not call mutating tools (mirrors can_use_tool in agent_host.py).
